name: @oah/desktop
description: Desktop client for OAH-compatible enterprise servers and OAP local daemons.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @oah/web build && node ../../scripts/copy-webui-to-cli.mjs && pnpm build && electron ./dist/main.js
scripts.package:dir: pnpm --filter @oah/web build && node ../../scripts/copy-webui-to-cli.mjs && pnpm build && pnpm dlx electron-builder --dir
